mbackup module¶

This module handles the cli interface for mbackup and is the entrypoint for the mbackup application.

mbackup.createLogger(logFile, debug=False)¶

Creates a logger object and sets the parameters The logger gets 2 handlers a file handler and a steamhandler for console output.

Parameters:
  • logFile (fileHandler) – File to log output to
  • debug (boolean) – set to true to enable debug output
Returns:

configured logger object
Return type:

object
mbackup.logDebugList(list)¶

Function to get a list debugged with the current logger.

Parameters:list (list) – Multidimensional list which needs to go to the debug logger.
mbackup.main()¶

Main function to call when executing mbackup from the cli. The function will do some initialization and will then loop over the provided list and backups with associated backup type.

Raises:MbackupError – When something goes wrong with a backup. Mbackup will continue with the next backup.
mbackup.parsArguments()¶

Setup argparse to handle the cli arguments

Returns:argparse object with processed arguments
Return type:object
mbackup.readBackupList(listFile)¶

Read list of locations to backup

Parameters:listFile (fileHandler) – File containing locations to backup
Returns:a multidimensional list.
Return type:list
Raises:an error when their is an unkown backup type. –
